name: Quincy Gold Corp.
description: Quincy Gold Corp., which later transitioned into Quincy Energy Corp., was a junior mining exploration company formerly listed on the TSX Venture Exchange. The company focused on the acquisition and development of mineral resource properties, including precious metals and uranium projects located in Canada and the United States. It operated as a reporting issuer in jurisdictions such as Alberta and British Columbia, engaging in strategic option agreements to explore and develop mining claims. The company has since undergone corporate restructuring and name changes, shifting its primary focus toward uranium resource development.
